task.en: A file named `expenses.txt` is on the Desktop listing several dollar amounts. Open it, add up ALL the dollar amounts, and in Reminders create a single reminder in the default list titled exactly `Expense total: $<sum>`, where <sum> is the total you computed, written with two decimal places (for example `$123.45`). Do not add any other reminders.

pre_command:
mkdir -p "$HOME/Desktop"; printf 'Trip expenses - June 2026
Hotel: $420.00
Taxi: $36.50
Client dinner: $128.75
Coffee: $14.25
Printing: $9.00
' > "$HOME/Desktop/expenses.txt"; for A in "/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app" "/Applications/iTerm.app" "/Applications/iTerm2.app" "/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app"; do [ -d "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || sudo chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; RDB="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores/Data-local.sqlite"; open -gj -a Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 8; osascript -e 'tell application "Reminders" to quit' 2>/dev/null; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] && sqlite3 "$RDB" "DELETE FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL LIKE 'Expense total:%';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$RDB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1;
grading_command: RDB="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores/Data-local.sqlite"; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); N=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT count(*) FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL LIKE 'Expense total:%' AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0);" 2>/dev/null); [ "$N" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

RDB="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores/Data-local.sqlite"; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); N=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT count(*) FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL LIKE '%608.5%' AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0);" 2>/dev/null); [ "$N" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

source.note: Re-grounded onto native macOS apps; concept port, not a literal import.
